pageTitle: cyIs the court hearing in the next 14 days?

heading: cyIs the court hearing in the next 14 days?
question: cyIs the court hearing in the next 14 days?
hintText: cyThis will affect the fee you will pay. You do not need to pay a fee if your court hearing is (at least) 14 days away.

errors.inNext14Days: cyConfirm whether the court hearing is in the next 14 days
